ddls:
CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps completed in the episode */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score achieved by all agents in the episode */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the episode */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the episode */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment for the episode */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "agent_type" TEXT /* Type of the agent (e.g., Industrial, Research, Service) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the agent */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the agent */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the agent */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date of manufacture of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode the performance is associated with */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent being evaluated */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the agent in the episode */,
  "speed" REAL /* Average speed of the agent during the episode */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy percentage of the agent's tasks */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency score of the agent */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors encountered by the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_performance_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_performance_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode this configuration applies to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "parameter" REAL /* Value of the parameter for this configuration */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_configurations_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who ran the simulation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the simulation was executed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation run */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the simulation run in seconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of all agents in the episode */,
  "max_score" REAL /* Maximum score achieved by any agent in the episode */,
  "min_score" REAL /* Minimum score achieved by any agent in the episode */,
  "std_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of scores in the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_summary_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)
